basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Deoghar Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 147 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Deoghar
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (by Speed Post) with a soft copy also emailed
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Deoghar has invited offline applications for 147 posts of Senior Resident (Non-Academic) across 39 clinical, pre-clinical and para-clinical departments. This is a rolling advertisement, meaning applications are accepted continuously in cycles, with the first cycle cutoff date for both soft copy and hard copy set at 04 August 2026. The appointment is initially for 1 year, extendable up to a maximum of 3 years, as per the Residency Scheme 1992, Government of India. Cutoff Date for Receiving Soft Copy

application_fee.details: The fee must be paid by Demand Draft (DD) drawn in favour of "AIIMS Deoghar," payable at AIIMS Deoghar (Account No. 41792595056, IFSC Code: SBIN0064014). No other mode of payment - cash, cheque, or postal order - will be accepted.

age_limit.maximum_age: 45 years (as on the day of interview)
age_limit.age_relaxation: Up to a maximum of 5 years

qualification.details: A Postgraduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/MDS) from a recognized University/Institute is required. Applicants holding DNB in broad specialties as their essential qualifying education must provide documentary evidence of its equivalence with MD/MS. For the Department of Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank specifically, the qualification required is MD (Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank) or DNB (Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank). | Eligibility with regard to age, educational qualification, and experience will be determined as on the date the candidate appears in the interview/written test examination.

salary_details.details: Selected Senior Residents will be placed at Level 11 of the Pay Matrix, with an entry pay of ₹67,700 per month, plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) and other usual allowances as admissible.

selection_process: Selection is through an Interview/Written Test Examination conducted department-wise. The date of the interview will be notified later on the AIIMS Deoghar website
and candidates are advised to check the website regularly. Eligible candidates must report to the Registrar Office
AIIMS Deoghar on the notified interview date with original documents
and one passport-size colour photograph. No TA/DA is admissible for appearing at the interview.
how_to_apply: Download the Offline Application Form from the official AIIMS Deoghar website.
Fill the form completely, mentioning the department applied for.
Paste one recent, self-attested passport-size colour photograph on the form.
Attach one set of self-attested photocopies of all relevant documents listed above.
Attach the Demand Draft (DD) for the applicable application fee, drawn in favour of "AIIMS Deoghar," payable at AIIMS Deoghar.
Superscribe the envelope: "Application for the Post of SR in the Department of __________."
Send the complete application by Speed Post to: Registrar Office, 4th Floor, AIIMS, Devipur (Academic Block), Deoghar - 814152 (Jharkhand), so as to reach by the cutoff date.

Additionally, send a soft copy of the same application, with enclosures and proof of fee payment (if applicable), combined into a single PDF file (not exceeding 5MB and legible when printed), to [email protected].
The last date for sending the application for the 1st cycle is 04 August 2026, counted from the publication of the advertisement on the AIIMS Deoghar website.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar SR Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview

rows.details: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Deoghar
Initially 1 year, extendable up to a maximum of 3 years, as per Residency Scheme 1992, Govt. of India
Rolling advertisement (applications accepted in continuous cycles)
Offline (by Speed Post) with a soft copy also emailed

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar SR Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
AIIMS Deoghar SR Recruitment 2026: Department-wise Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Vacancies are distributed across 39 departments as follows. UR = Unreserved, OBC-NCL = Other Backward Classes (Non-Creamy Layer), SC = Scheduled Caste, ST = Scheduled Tribe, EWS = Economically Weaker Sections. An additional 5% PwD reservation applies on a horizontal basis as per Government rules. Note: Vacancies in the departments above may increase or decrease at the time of selection, at the discretion of the Executive Director & CEO, AIIMS Deoghar, as per institutional need. The figures given are provisional and subject to change without notice. As per EWS guidelines, if an EWS-earmarked vacancy cannot be filled due to the unavailability of an EWS candidate, it will not be carried forward as a backlog; other category candidates may be provisionally allowed to apply for such posts, subject to being considered as UR candidates if the post remains otherwise unfilled.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A Postgraduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/MDS) from a recognized University/Institute is required. Applicants holding DNB in broad specialties as their essential qualifying education must provide documentary evidence of its equivalence with MD/MS. For the Department of Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank specifically, the qualification required is MD (Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank) or DNB (Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank). Eligibility with regard to age, educational qualification, and experience will be determined as on the date the candidate appears in the interview/written test examination.

rows.detail: 45 years (as on the day of interview)
Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency will not be considered for this post
Up to a maximum of 5 years
Up to a maximum of 3 years

content_sections.heading: Salary
content_sections.text: Selected Senior Residents will be placed at Level 11 of the Pay Matrix , with an entry pay of ₹67,700 per month , plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) and other usual allowances as admissible.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The fee must be paid by Demand Draft (DD) drawn in favour of "AIIMS Deoghar," payable at AIIMS Deoghar (Account No. 41792595056, IFSC Code: SBIN0064014). No other mode of payment - cash, cheque, or postal order - will be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is through an Interview/Written Test Examination conducted department-wise. The date of the interview will be notified later on the AIIMS Deoghar website, and candidates are advised to check the website regularly. Eligible candidates must report to the Registrar Office, Administrative Block, 4th Floor, AIIMS Deoghar on the notified interview date with original documents, photocopies of relevant documents, and one passport-size colour photograph. No TA/DA is admissible for appearing at the interview.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must send one set of self-attested photocopies of the following documents along with the offline application form, Demand Draft, and a passport-size colour photograph pasted on the form: Date of Birth and Class X and XII Certificate Aadhaar Card SC/ST/EWS/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/OPH certificate from the competent authority, if applicable (OBC certificate must be the latest, issued for FY 2026-27, not older than one year as on the last date of application, and the candidate's sub-caste must match the Central List of OBC; EWS/OBC certificates issued between 01.04.2026 and the last date of application will be considered valid) MBBS mark sheets and degree certificate Attempt certificates MBBS internship completion certificate MD/MS/DNB mark sheets and degree certificate Medical Registration Certificate (UG and PG) from MCI/State Medical Council NOC from present employer, if employed in a Central/State Government/Semi-Government/Autonomous/Private institution Experience certificate(s) of previous institutions, if any FMGE certificate conducted by NBE (for foreign medical graduates) Copies of any other relevant documents (publications, awards, fellowships, patents, books/chapters authored, etc.)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Deoghar SR (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the Offline Application Form from the official AIIMS Deoghar website. Fill the form completely, mentioning the department applied for. Paste one recent, self-attested passport-size colour photograph on the form. Attach one set of self-attested photocopies of all relevant documents listed above. Attach the Demand Draft (DD) for the applicable application fee, drawn in favour of "AIIMS Deoghar," payable at AIIMS Deoghar. Superscribe the envelope: "Application for the Post of SR in the Department of __________." Send the complete application by Speed Post to: Registrar Office, 4th Floor, AIIMS, Devipur (Academic Block), Deoghar - 814152 (Jharkhand), so as to reach by the cutoff date. Additionally, send a soft copy of the same application, with enclosures and proof of fee payment (if applicable), combined into a single PDF file (not exceeding 5MB and legible when printed), to [email protected] .

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Deoghar Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For the 1st cycle of this rolling advertisement, the cutoff date for receiving both the soft copy and the hard copy of the application is 04 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there for AIIMS Deoghar SR (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 147 total vacancies across 39 departments, though the notification states these figures are provisional and may increase or decrease at the time of selection.

faq.question: Q3. What does "rolling advertisement" mean for this AIIMS Deoghar recruitment?
faq.answer: A rolling advertisement means applications are invited continuously in cycles rather than a single one-time window. The notification specifies the cutoff dates for the 1st cycle; details of further cycles are not specified in the current notification and will be updated on the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for AIIMS Deoghar Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 45 years as on the day of interview. Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency are not eligible. Age relaxation is available for SC/ST (up to 5 years), OBC (up to 3 years), and OPH candidates (5 to 10 years depending on category).

faq.question: Q5. What qualification is required for AIIMS Deoghar SR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A Postgraduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/MDS) from a recognized University/Institute is required. DNB holders in broad specialties must submit documentary proof of equivalence with MD/MS. The Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank department specifically requires MD or DNB in Transfusion Medicine & Blood Bank.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Deoghar SR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹3,000 for UR, ₹1,000 for OBC, and ₹1,000 for EWS candidates, payable only by Demand Draft in favour of "AIIMS Deoghar." No fee is required for SC/ST, PWD (all categories), or Women (all categories) candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for AIIMS Deoghar Senior Resident (Non-Academic)?
faq.answer: Selected candidates receive Level 11 of the Pay Matrix with an entry pay of ₹67,700 per month, plus NPA and other usual allowances.

faq.question: Q8. Is this an online or offline application process?
faq.answer: This is an offline application process. Candidates must send the filled application form with documents and DD by Speed Post, and additionally email a single combined PDF copy to [email protected].

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates currently employed in government institutions apply?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates employed in Central/State Government, Semi-Government, Autonomous, or Private institutions can apply but must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer, and if selected, may join only after their resignation is accepted by their current employer.

faq.question: Q10. When will the interview date for AIIMS Deoghar SR Recruitment be announced?
faq.answer: The interview date will be notified later on the official AIIMS Deoghar website, www.aiimsdeoghar.edu.in. Candidates are advised to check the website regularly for updates.
